creator: tjlegg@gmail.com
text:
Do you have clinfo installed? If so, can you provide the output?

My output:
$ clinfo
MESA-LOADER: failed to retrieve device information
MESA-LOADER: failed to retrieve device information
MESA-LOADER: failed to retrieve device information
MESA-LOADER: failed to retrieve device information
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

It used to locate the AMD processor prior to the latest libdrm update.
